parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the effect. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the effect.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal.
parameters-en.Vol Sens: Controls the peak follower's input sensitivity. Higher values cause the input signal to generate fast modulation, which slows down gradually as the input signal decays.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. To recreate the original pedal's Vibrato switch, set Mix to 100%.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
